headline: A Look At EMCOR Group (EME) Valuation After Record Results And Growing Data Center Backlog
summary: EMCOR Group (EME) is back on investor radars after reporting strong 2025 results, highlighting a sizable backlog in data center and electrical or mechanical projects, and with an earnings report approaching on April 29, 2026. See our latest analysis for EMCOR Group. After a strong run that includes a 25.31% 90 day share price return and a 36.21% year to date share price return, EMCOR Group now trades at US$869.90. Its very large 5 year total shareholder return signals that momentum has been...
